title: bracteantha viscosa
intro: Bracteantha viscosa, also known as Sticky Button Bush, is a small shrub native to Australia that produces yellow flowers and sticky leaves. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Bracteantha viscosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
